evals.prompt: Run /research breadth on the directory tests/fixtures/
evals.expected_output: Knowledge Graph with nodes and edges, Zwicky dimensions, gap matrix

assertions.text: nodes.yaml exists and contains at least 5 nodes
Every node has the required fields: id, name, type, sources, summary
edges.yaml exists and contains at least 3 edges
Edge types are only from the allowed set: supports, conflicts, requires, amplifies, activates, limits
The concept 'foot traffic' or 'location' was extracted as a node
The concept 'menu optimization' or 'pricing strategy' was extracted as a node
An 'amplifies' edge between location and menu strategy was recognized
The conflict between menu variety and service speed was recognized as a 'conflicts' edge
dimensions.yaml exists and contains at least 2 dimensions
gap-matrix.md exists and identifies at least 1 gap
A run entry under runs/ was created with run.yaml
